primary_detection.name: Template Literal Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Malicious commands constructed using Python f-strings and JavaScript template literals

underlying_threats.name: Remote Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Downloads and executes remote payloads via curl/wget

underlying_threats.name: Dynamic Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Uses exec() in Python with f-string assembled code

underlying_threats.name: Shell Command Injection
underlying_threats.description: Executes shell commands via subprocess (Python) and child_process (Node.js)

obfuscation_indicators: Tagged template functions for additional obfuscation
verdict_reasoning: Cross-language template literal abuse to dynamically construct and obscure malicious command strings
